banner.title: We'd love to hear from you!
banner.subtitle: Your feedback helps us improve and make things better for you.

footer: Your app version and device details are sent automatically to help us debug.

errors.message_required: Please enter a message (at least 3 characters).
errors.message_too_long: Message can't be longer than 500 characters.
errors.invalid_email: That email address doesn't look right.
errors.network_error: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.generic_body: We couldn't send your feedback. Please try again.

success.title: Thanks, we got it
success.body: You'll get a confirmation email, and we'll reply if it needs one.
